scripts.copy-assets: cp app.json .homeybuild/ && cp -r assets .homeybuild/ && cp -r drivers/thermostat/assets .homeybuild/drivers/thermostat/ && cp -r .homeycompose .homeybuild/ && cp .homeychangelog.json .homeybuild/ 2>/dev/null; true
scripts.dev: npm run build && export DAIKIN_API_KEY=$(node -p "require('./env.json').DAIKIN_API_KEY") && npm run inject-key && homey app run --skip-build
scripts.publish-build: npm run build && npm run inject-key
